hero_subtitle: SFTY helps VASPs consolidate multi-provider KYT data into a single operational workflow that routes reviews, preserves audit evidence, and supports case management seamlessly.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions

trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow

problem_title: Compliance slows when KYT data fragments
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to turn disparate KYT provider outputs into clear risk decisions. This creates manual work, weak evidence trails and inconsistent compliance review across wallets and transactions.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY aggregates KYT provider data, normalizes wallet and transaction risk signals, applies rules and routes exceptions into structured cases with preserved evidence for operational compliance teams to review efficiently.
workflow_title: From wallet risk signals to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY aggregates wallet risk alerts from multiple providers, routes them through reviews and cases, and records decisions with preserved evidence for compliance reporting.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond KYT data. Structured compliance decisions
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects multiple KYT provider outputs into a unified workflow that supports case creation, decision logging and preserves audit-ready evidence for operational control.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs by turning multi-provider KYT data into structured compliance decisions with audit-ready evidence and controlled enterprise deployment from day one.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how KYT provider outputs feed compliance case workflows
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit-ready evidence is preserved from KYT data

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for KYT compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a connected compliance layer that turns KYT data from multiple sources into structured alerts, cases, decisions and audit-ready evidence supporting operational risk review.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY orchestrate multiple KYT providers?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates and normalizes output from KYT providers, applies internal risk rules, routes alerts for review, creates cases and links wallet and transaction risk in one workflow.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve KYT audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves KYT-related data, decision logs and evidence packages in a secure, traceable record to support review readiness and regulatory inspection without altering original provider outputs.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects existing KYT, Travel Rule and screening solutions into one operating layer without replacing them, enabling seamless data orchestration and controlled compliance workflow integration.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace underlying KYT or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYT or Travel Rule providers; it connects their outputs into structured compliance decisions, cases and reporting workflows to reduce manual fragmentation.
final_title: Turn KYT alerts into structured compliance cases
final_description: Explore how SFTY connects multi-provider KYT data into review workflows, decision logs and audit-ready evidence packages.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
